LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_FMLY_CMNTY_SPRT_1_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = I don't need any help 
1 = I get all the help I need 
2 = I could use a little more help 
3 = I need a lot more help

COMMENT: Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening.
